2202580.name: Dearg
2202580.description:
Having just picked her sister,
Amelia and Alanna drive through the Scottish forests when it starts to rain hard.
Stressed and angry from the storm,
they get into a heated argument
when something suddenly appears in the road and causes them to crash.

What was in the road? Where is Alanna after the crash?

First-Person Survival – Players will assume the role of Amelia Ferguson and experience every up-close narrative and terrifying pursuit through a first-person perspective.

Original Story – Experience a story unlike any other that hasn't been told before.

Innovative & Original Gameplay Elements – While some gameplay elements are vastly over used in games, we bring in a fresh new way to play.
2202580.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
